node.statement: Step C3 (Cost of Beta-FFT-procedure at split parameter k=1). One halving level: compute (A_{n1}^L, B_{n1}^L) and (A_{n2}^{L+n1}, B_{n2}^{L+n1}) recursively; combine via 4 pointwise (.) products + 2 vector sums over length-N vectors = O(N) per combine. Recursion depth O(log N); per-degree cost O(N log N). Summed over O(N^3) target coefficients (l, m, n with -l <= m,n <= l, 0 <= l < N): total O(N^4 log N). Dominant term is O(N^4) once log factor is absorbed into the leading constant for k=1 (paper line 1455 explicitly drops the log at k=1).
